mapper.insert:
insert into d_order_ticket_user (id, order_number, program_id, user_id, ticket_user_id, seat_id, seat_info, ticket_category_id, order_price, create_order_time, create_time, edit_time) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.orderNumber,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.programId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.ticketUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.seatId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.seatInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.ticketCategoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.orderPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.createOrderTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.editTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.delete: delete from d_order_ticket_user where order_status in (1,2,3,4)
